editionTitle: IB ACIO Daily Current Affairs — 12 July 2026
editionTitle_hi: आईबी एसीआईओ दैनिक करेंट अफेयर्स — 12 जुलाई 2026

articles.title: MGNREGA — Guaranteed Rural Employment Scheme
articles.summary: Mahatma Gandhi NREG Act 2005 guarantees 100 days of wage employment per rural household per year.
articles.summary_hi: महात्मा गांधी NREG अधिनियम 2005 ग्रामीण परिवार को प्रति वर्ष 100 दिन मजदूरी रोजगार की गारंटी देता है।
articles.content:
The Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act (MGNREGA) was enacted in 2005 and came into force in 2006.

It guarantees at least 100 days of wage employment in a financial year to every rural household whose adult members volunteer for unskilled manual work.

Wages are paid according to the Minimum Wages Act. At least one-third of beneficiaries must be women. The scheme is demand-driven and implemented by Gram Panchayats.

For IB ACIO: 100 days guarantee, enactment year (2005), and one-third women quota are key facts.
articles.content_hi:
MGNREGA 2005 में अधिनियम, 2006 से लागू। 100 दिन गारंटीकृत रोजगार।

न्यूनतम एक-तिहाई महिलाएं। ग्राम पंचायत लागू करती है। IB ACIO: 100 दिन, 2005 — याद रखें।
articles.question: How many days of guaranteed employment does MGNREGA provide per rural household per year?
articles.question_hi: MGNREGA प्रति ग्रामीण परिवार प्रति वर्ष कितne दिन रोजगार गारंटी देता है?
articles.explanation: MGNREGA guarantees at least 100 days of wage employment per rural household per financial year.
articles.explanation_hi: MGNREGA प्रति वित्त वर्ष प्रति ग्रामीण परिवार कम से कम 100 दिन मजदूरी रोजगार गारंटी देता है।
articles.moreInfo: World's largest public works programme. Funded by Central + State governments (90:10 ratio for most states).
articles.moreInfo_hi: दुनिया का सबसे बड़ा सार्वजनिक कार्य कार्यक्रम। केंद्र+राज्य वित्तपोषण।

articles.title: United Nations — Structure, Charter, and India’s Role
articles.title_hi: संयुक्त राष्ट्र — संरचना, Charter और भारत की भूमिका
articles.summary: The UN was founded in 1945 with 193 member states. India was a founding member and seeks permanent UNSC seat.
articles.summary_hi: UN 1945 में 193 सदस्यों के साथ स्थापित। भारत संस्थापक सदस्य, स्थायी UNSC सीट चाहता है।
articles.content:
The United Nations was established on 24 October 1945 after World War II, replacing the League of Nations.

Main organs: General Assembly, Security Council (15 members, 5 permanent with veto), ECOSOC, Trusteeship Council (inactive), International Court of Justice (The Hague), and UN Secretariat.

India is a founding member and contributes significantly to UN peacekeeping (one of the largest troop contributors). India has been elected to the UNSC as non-permanent member multiple times.

For IB ACIO: founding (1945), UN Day (24 Oct), 5 permanent UNSC members (P5), and India's peacekeeping role.
articles.content_hi:
UN 24 अक्टूबर 1945 में स्थापित। मुख्य अंग: GA, UNSC, ECOSOC, ICJ, Secretariat।

5 स्थायी UNSC सदस्य veto के साथ। भारत शांति सेना में बड़ा योगदान।

IB ACIO: 1945, 24 Oct, P5 — याद रखें।
articles.question: When is United Nations Day observed?
articles.question_hi: संयुक्त राष्ट्र दिवस कब मनाया जाता है?
articles.explanation: UN Day is observed on 24 October, marking the entry into force of the UN Charter in 1945.
articles.explanation_hi: UN दिवस 24 अक्टूबर — 1945 में UN Charter प्रभावी हुआ।
articles.moreInfo: P5: USA, UK, France, Russia, China. UN HQ: New York. WHO, UNESCO, UNICEF are UN agencies.
articles.moreInfo_hi: P5: USA, UK, France, Russia, China। UN HQ: New York।

articles.title: Fiscal Deficit — Key Budget Term for Competitive Exams
articles.title_hi: राजकोषीय घाटा — प्रतियोगी परीक्षाओं के लिए महत्वपूर्ण बजट शब्द
articles.summary: Fiscal deficit is the gap between government total expenditure and total receipts excluding borrowings.
articles.summary_hi: राजकोषीय घाटा सरकार के कुल व्यय और उधार को छोड़कर कुल प्राप्तियों के बीच अंतर है।
articles.content:
Fiscal Deficit = Total Expenditure − (Revenue Receipts + Non-Debt Capital Receipts).

It indicates how much the government needs to borrow to meet its expenses. India's fiscal deficit target is typically set in the Union Budget as a percentage of GDP.

The FRBM Act (Fiscal Responsibility and Budget Management Act, 2003) sets targets for fiscal discipline. Revenue deficit and primary deficit are related concepts.

For IB ACIO: fiscal deficit formula, FRBM Act 2003, and distinction from revenue deficit are frequently tested in economy sections.
articles.content_hi:
राजकोषीय घाटा = कुल व्यय − (राजस्व प्राप्ति + गैर-ऋण पूंजी प्राप्ति)।

FRBM अधिनियम 2003 राजकोषीय अनुशासन के लक्ष्य तय करता है।

IB ACIO: सूत्र, FRBM 2003 — अक्सर पूछा जाता है।
articles.question: The FRBM Act was enacted in which year?
articles.question_hi: FRBM अधिनियम किस वर्ष पारित हुआ?
articles.explanation: The Fiscal Responsibility and Budget Management Act was enacted in 2003 to institutionalise fiscal discipline.
articles.explanation_hi: FRBM अधिनियम 2003 में राजकोषीय अनुशासन के लिए पारित किया गया।
articles.moreInfo: Primary deficit = Fiscal deficit − Interest payments. Revenue deficit = Revenue expenditure − Revenue receipts.
articles.moreInfo_hi: प्राथमिक घाटा = राजकोषीय घाटा − ब्याज। राजस्व घाटा = राजस्व व्यय − राजस्व प्राप्ति।

articles.title: Integrated Theatre Commands — Military Reforms in India
articles.title_hi: एकीकृत थिएटर कमान — भारत में सै воен सुधार
articles.summary: India is creating Integrated Theatre Commands to unify Army, Navy, and Air Force operations for joint warfare.
articles.summary_hi: भारत संयुक्त युद्ध के लिए Army, Navy, Air Force को एकीकृत थिएटर कमान में ला रहा है।
articles.content:
India is restructuring its military into Integrated Theatre Commands (ITCs) to enable joint operations across the Army, Navy, and Air Force.

The first proposed command is the Maritime Theatre Command, followed by Air Defence, Western, and Eastern commands. This replaces the current service-specific command structure.

The Chief of Defence Staff (CDS) post was created in 2020 to oversee tri-services integration. General Bipin Rawat was the first CDS.

For IB ACIO: CDS creation (2020), purpose (jointness), and theatre command concept are defence reform highlights.
articles.content_hi:
भारत Integrated Theatre Commands बना रहा है — Army, Navy, Air Force संयुक्त संचालन।

CDS पद 2020 में बनाया गया। पहले CDS: Gen Bipin Rawat।

IB ACIO: CDS 2020, jointness — महत्वपूर्ण।
articles.question: The post of Chief of Defence Staff (CDS) in India was created in which year?
articles.question_hi: भारत में Chief of Defence Staff (CDS) पद किस वर्ष बनाया गया?
articles.explanation: The CDS post was created in December 2019 and became operational in January 2020.
articles.explanation_hi: CDS पद दिसंबर 2019 में बनाया गया, जनवरी 2020 से कार्यात्मक।
articles.moreInfo: CDS is principal military adviser to Defence Minister. Also heads Department of Military Affairs.
articles.moreInfo_hi: CDS रक्षा मंत्री के प्रमुख सै воен सलाहकार। सै воen मामलों के विभाग के प्रमुख।

articles.title: Gaganyaan — India’s First Human Spaceflight Mission
articles.title_hi: गगनयान — भारत का पहला मानव अंतरिक्ष मिशन
articles.summary: Gaganyaan will send Indian astronauts (Gagannauts) to low Earth orbit — ISRO’s flagship human spaceflight programme.
articles.summary_hi: गगनयान भारतीय अंतरिक्ष यात्रियों (Gagannauts) को निम्न पृथ्वी कक्षा में भेजेगा।
articles.content:
Gaganyaan is ISRO's ambitious human spaceflight programme to demonstrate India's capability to send humans to Low Earth Orbit (LEO) and return them safely.

The mission will use the GSLV Mk-III (LVM-3) launch vehicle. Crew module will carry 3 Gagannauts. Test flights include uncrewed missions before the manned flight.

ISRO has developed critical systems: Crew Escape System, Environmental Control & Life Support System, and crew training at Russia/India facilities.

For IB ACIO: mission name, launch vehicle (GSLV Mk-III/LVM-3), and crew count (3) are key ISRO facts.
articles.content_hi:
गगनयान ISRO का मानव अंतरिक्ष मिशन — LEO में भेजकर सुरक्षित वापसी।

GSLV Mk-III (LVM-3) लॉन्च वाहन। 3 Gagannauts।

IB ACIO: Gaganyaan, LVM-3, 3 crew — याद रखें।
articles.question: Which launch vehicle will be used for the Gaganyaan mission?
articles.question_hi: गगनयान मिशन के लिए कौन सा लॉन्च वाहन उपयोग होगा?
articles.explanation: Gaganyaan will use the GSLV Mk-III, now called LVM-3 (Launch Vehicle Mark-3).
articles.moreInfo: Related: Chandrayaan (Moon), Aditya-L1 (Sun). Gaganyaan = human spaceflight.
articles.moreInfo_hi: संबंधित: Chandrayaan, Aditya-L1। Gaganyaan = मानव अंतरिक्ष।

articles.title: Stand-Up India — Loans for SC/ST and Women Entrepreneurs
articles.title_hi: स्टैंड-अप इंडिया — SC/ST और महिला उद्यमियों के लिए ऋण
articles.summary: Stand-Up India provides bank loans of ₹10 lakh to ₹1 crore for greenfield enterprises by SC/ST and women.
articles.summary_hi: स्टैंड-अप इंडिया SC/ST और महिलाओं को ₹10 लाख से ₹1 करोड़ ऋण देता है।
articles.content:
Stand-Up India Scheme was launched on 5 April 2016 to promote entrepreneurship among SC/ST communities and women.

It facilitates bank loans between ₹10 lakh and ₹1 crore for at least one SC/ST borrower and one woman borrower per bank branch for setting up greenfield enterprises in manufacturing, services, or trading.

The scheme is anchored by the Department of Financial Services, Ministry of Finance, and implemented through Scheduled Commercial Banks.

For IB ACIO: launch (April 2016), loan range (₹10L-₹1Cr), and target groups (SC/ST + women) are key.
articles.content_hi:
स्टैंड-अप इंडिया 5 अप्रैल 2016 में SC/ST और महिलाओं के लिए उद्यमिता।

₹10 लाख से ₹1 करोड़ ऋण। प्रति शाखा कम से कम 1 SC/ST + 1 महिला।

IB ACIO: 2016, ₹10L-₹1Cr — याद रखें।
articles.question: Stand-Up India scheme provides loans in the range of:
articles.question_hi: स्टैंड-अप इंडिया योजना किस सीमा में ऋण देती है?
articles.explanation: Stand-Up India provides loans between ₹10 lakh and ₹1 crore for greenfield enterprises.
articles.explanation_hi: स्टैंड-अप इंडिया ₹10 लाख से ₹1 करोड़ ऋण देता है।
articles.moreInfo: Related: Startup India, MUDRA (up to ₹10 lakh). Stand-Up targets higher loan amounts.
articles.moreInfo_hi: संबंधित: Startup India, MUDRA (₹10 लाख तक)।

articles.title: COP28 — Global Climate Summit Outcomes
articles.summary: COP28 (Dubai, 2023) called for transitioning away from fossil fuels and tripling renewable energy capacity.
articles.summary_hi: COP28 (दुबई, 2023) ने जीवाश्म ईंधन से हटने और नवीकरणीय ऊर्जा तीन गुना बढ़ाने का आह्वान किया।
articles.content:
The 28th Conference of Parties (COP28) to the UNFCCC was held in Dubai, UAE in November-December 2023.

Key outcomes included the first Global Stocktake, a call to transition away from fossil fuels in energy systems, and tripling global renewable energy capacity by 2030.

India advocated for 'Common but Differentiated Responsibilities' (CBDR) — developed nations should lead emission cuts while developing nations need growth space.

For IB ACIO: COP28 host (Dubai 2023), fossil fuel transition language, and CBDR principle are environment GK essentials.
articles.content_hi:
COP28 नवंबर-दिसंबर 2023 दुबई, UAE में।

पहला Global Stocktake, जीवाश्म ईंधन से हटने का आह्वान, 2030 तक नवीकरणीय तीन गुना।

भारत CBDR का समर्थन। IB ACIO: Dubai 2023, CBDR — याद रखें।
articles.question: COP28 was held in which city?
articles.question_hi: COP28 किस शहर में आयोजित हुआ?
articles.explanation: COP28 was held in Dubai, United Arab Emirates, in 2023.
articles.explanation_hi: COP28 2023 में UAE के दुबई में आयोजित हुआ।
articles.moreInfo: COP21 Paris 2015: Paris Agreement. COP26 Glasgow 2021. India pledged net-zero by 2070 at COP26.
articles.moreInfo_hi: COP21 Paris 2015: Paris Agreement। भारत COP26 पर 2070 net-zero।

articles.title: Lok Sabha — Composition, Powers, and Term
articles.title_hi: Lok Sabha — संरचना, शक्तियां और कार्यकाल
articles.summary: Lok Sabha is the lower house with max 552 members, 5-year term, and key role in money bills and government formation.
articles.summary_hi: Lok Sabha निचला सदन, अधिकतम 552 सदस्य, 5 वर्ष कार्यकाल, मनी बिल और सरकार गठन में महत्वपूर्ण।
articles.content:
Lok Sabha (House of the People) can have a maximum of 552 members: 530 from states, 20 from UTs, and 2 nominated Anglo-Indians (nomination discontinued).

Normal term is 5 years (Article 83). It can be dissolved earlier. The Speaker presides over Lok Sabha. Money Bills can only originate in Lok Sabha.

The Council of Ministers is collectively responsible to Lok Sabha (Article 75). A no-confidence motion can bring down the government.

For IB ACIO: max strength (552), term (5 years), money bill origin, and collective responsibility are polity must-knows.
articles.content_hi:
Lok Sabha अधिकतम 552 सदस्य। 5 वर्ष कार्यकाल (धारा 83)।

Speaker अध्यक्षता। Money Bill केवल Lok Sabha से। मंत्रिपरिषद collectively जिम्मेदार (धारा 75)।

IB ACIO: 552, 5 वर्ष, Money Bill — याद रखें।
articles.question: What is the maximum strength of Lok Sabha as per the Constitution?
articles.question_hi: संविधान के अनुसार Lok Sabha की अधिकतम संख्या क्या है?
articles.explanation: Lok Sabha can have a maximum of 552 members as per Article 81 of the Constitution.
articles.explanation_hi: धारा 81 के अनुसार Lok Sabha में अधिकतम 552 सदस्य हो सकते हैं।
articles.moreInfo: Rajya Sabha max 250 (238 elected + 12 nominated). Lok Sabha is more powerful on money matters.
articles.moreInfo_hi: Rajya Sabha अधिकतम 250। Lok Sabha वित्तीय मामलों में अधिक शक्तिशाली।
